label: A안 — 인물 + 구체 사건 + 짧은 텍스트 (승리 공식)
prompt_en: Photorealistic portrait of a stern-faced middle-aged Asian male financial regulator in a dark navy suit, standing in front of a massive glowing digital stock ticker showing '9,052' and a red downward arrow. His expression shows deep concern and tension. Behind him, streams of golden light representing money flow are visibly leaving the scene, moving away from him. The lighting is dramatic with warm golden highlights on his face contrasting with cool blue-green stock screens. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.
concept: MSCI 결정을 앞둔 긴장감 + 자금 유출 시각화

label: B안 — 차트/오브젝트 중심
prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic scene of a massive golden fish jumping out of a small bright aquarium bowl into a vast dark ocean. The fish is mid-leap, scales gleaming with golden light. The small bowl is labeled with glowing Korean market symbols. The ocean is impossibly vast and deep blue-black, emphasizing the size contrast. Tiny plankton particles float in the dark water where the fish is heading. Dramatic cinematic lighting with the fish illuminated by a single spotlight from above. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

label: 와일드카드 — 다른 인물
prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic portrait of Henry Fernandez, MSCI CEO, a distinguished Latino man in his 60s wearing a dark expensive suit, photographed from slightly below. He is holding a glowing golden stamp or seal in his right hand, poised to stamp downward. His expression is powerful and decisive. Behind him, a split background: left side shows a bright golden skyline representing developed markets, right side shows a darker, receding cityscape representing emerging markets. Red and gold lighting creates tension. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.
